description: CompositionBlack top made of PV jersey, with a round neck, dolman sleeves, cross cut panel across the waist with a small pocket on the left mid, and lee branding in silver thread above left hemFittingComfortWash careHand wash coldWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsFlowey and stylish, this black top is all that you need for those casual days out. The viscose fabric silhouettes your contours perfectly, and keeps you fresh all day. Team this with jeans or skirts and sleek sandals for that chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
